provenance_correction.chronology: The recovered source header is 2026-07-13T16:02:10-0500 and the initial rejection artifact was born at 2026-07-13T16:09:35-0500. The execution preceded the rejection and was discovered later.
provenance_correction.custody_status: No preregistered authorization, tape manifest, per-tape ledger, command manifest, stdout/stderr log or immutable commit receipt accompanies the result.
provenance_correction.scientific_status: Quarantined exploratory output only. It may be inspected to diagnose the rejected runner but cannot establish H_PI, H_obs, a comparator ranking, a Paper 2 result or a null.
provenance_correction.seed_hygiene_effect: Seeds 9600001-9600400 are burned permanently and may never be called virgin. The remainder of the open-ended 9600001+ declaration is not reserved for reuse; a valid future protocol must allocate a new disjoint block.

valid_surviving_component.scope: Exact published Cobb-Douglas mathematical transformation only when supplied with valid positive factory-APP components and the correct strategy-level cost normalization.

fatal_findings: The synthetic sinusoid, Gaussian dips and latent cv generator are neither Garrido's 36-period experiment nor a sourced researcher extension.
S21/S22 workforce, level production, terminal-period exceptions, overtime cost and zero-capacity delay are materially inconsistent with the published APP algorithms.
The 1e-3 log floors and per-tape counterfactual cost normalization are unregistered, ranking-relevant construct changes.

The proposed observable policy receives the latent full-path noise parameter cv and selects one pure strategy for the whole episode; it is privileged contextual selection, not deployable sequential feedback.
The reported PI quantity is hindsight selection among seven unequal-resource pure strategies, not the full resource-restricted H_PI, and the comparator is selected using the alleged holdout.

No full-horizon open-loop or classical APP frontier, resource envelope, null cell, placebo inference, action audit, per-tape ledger, tape hashes or fail-closed one-time opening mechanism is implemented.
Stage B lacks a validated MFSC hiring, firing, overtime, inventory and APP cost ledger and therefore remains an unauthorized sketch.
The raw field paper_reproduces_dominant_pure=true was hard-coded by the deleted runner rather than computed and is retracted as reproduction evidence.

scientific_effect.metric_governance: Cobb-Douglas remains a frozen secondary construct for current Paper 2 and cannot rescue canonical ret_excel_visible_v1 or service guardrail failures.
scientific_effect.raw_stage_a_numbers: Not evidence: they were produced by the rejected synthetic physics, privileged selector, unequal-resource strategy set and incomplete comparator contract.
